notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.4. It addresses 19 CVEs: CVE-2024-47727, CVE-2023-52730, CVE-2023-52791, CVE-2023-52834, CVE-2023-52835, and 14 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
